claim_boundary: This wedge spec narrows only the next residual-alpha lab refinement pass on the sealed augmentation court. It does not reopen the counted lane or authorize learned routing.

rows.alpha_liability: Alpha can stop at a locally good answer without pricing downstream failure cost.
rows.failure_condition: Family keeps local route signal but either loses shortcut resistance, loses restraint, or still fails to move the branch-level comparator.
rows.family_thesis: Route strategist only where sequence-aware planning actually lowers rollback or downstream break cost.
rows.held_out_preservation_rule: No counted-lane widening is lawful until new proof objects move on a fresh ordered rerun.
rows.success_condition: Convert fenced-family route value into a stronger superiority-relevant proof change without losing masked survival, null-route restraint, control preservation, orthogonality, or acceptable stress tax.

rows.alpha_liability: Alpha can sound acceptable while underpricing receipt gaps, policy breaks, or overclaim risk.
rows.failure_condition: Family keeps local route signal but either loses shortcut resistance, loses restraint, or still fails to move the branch-level comparator.
rows.family_thesis: Route auditor where admissibility repair or fail-closed review materially reduces downstream governance cost.
rows.held_out_preservation_rule: No counted-lane widening is lawful until new proof objects move on a fresh ordered rerun.
rows.success_condition: Convert fenced-family route value into a stronger superiority-relevant proof change without losing masked survival, null-route restraint, control preservation, orthogonality, or acceptable stress tax.

rows.alpha_liability: Alpha can overcommit to the first clean framing instead of holding a live rival interpretation.
rows.failure_condition: Family keeps local route signal but either loses shortcut resistance, loses restraint, or still fails to move the branch-level comparator.
rows.family_thesis: Route beta where preserving the rival frame reduces false certainty and framing-lock error cost.
rows.held_out_preservation_rule: No counted-lane widening is lawful until new proof objects move on a fresh ordered rerun.
rows.success_condition: Convert fenced-family route value into a stronger superiority-relevant proof change without losing masked survival, null-route restraint, control preservation, orthogonality, or acceptable stress tax.

rows.alpha_liability: Forced commitment under high ambiguity can cost more than lawful abstention.
rows.failure_condition: Forced routing displaces lawful abstention on the boundary control.
rows.family_thesis: Keep abstention lawful and stable even while other route-bearing families sharpen.
rows.held_out_preservation_rule: No counted-lane widening is lawful until new proof objects move on a fresh ordered rerun.
rows.success_condition: Abstention remains the rightful fail-closed path under residual refinement.

rows.alpha_liability: No liability should be asserted on true static-control families.
rows.failure_condition: Any new routing or abstention appears on the static control family.
rows.family_thesis: Protect the rightful no-route hold so added route value does not mutate into route eagerness.
rows.held_out_preservation_rule: No counted-lane widening is lawful until new proof objects move on a fresh ordered rerun.
rows.success_condition: Static control remains a truthful no-route hold under residual refinement.
